---
title: "Week 7: Measuring and improving performance"
summary: "Measure performance, profile bottlenecks, and improve the speed of R code where it matters."
prepare: "Read the Efficient R material and come with questions about profiling and optimisation."
resource_label: "Efficient R"
resource_url: "https://csgillespie.github.io/efficientR/"
focus:
  - "Measuring performance"
  - "Identifying bottlenecks"
  - "Improving runtime where it matters"
  - "Using Efficient R as a practical guide"
---

```{r}
week <- 7
source(here::here("course_info.R"))
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
show_week_overview(week)
```

## What you will learn this week

* [Efficient R Programming](https://csgillespie.github.io/efficientR/)


```{r}
#| output: asis
show_slides(week)
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
show_assignments(week)
```
